Notes: Will Semicon — Basic part. Matrix diode for the 3x3 key grid.

column8: Extended (no Basic 1206 white was in stock for the v0.0.0.17 fab run). Verified 1206 (3.2x1.6mm) — do NOT pick KT-0603W C2290 (it's 0603) or XL-1606UWC C965866 (1.7x1.1mm). For color other than white substitute KT-1206R/G/B/Y same series; KT-1206R is cheapest at ~$0.0084.

Notes: Yageo 0603WAF680JT5E (68 ohm 5% 0603) — Basic. Current limit for L1-L9. Same family as R10. v0.0.0.17 fab originally got Extended Yageo RTT0268R0FTH C103146; swapped to this Basic part to skip the $3 Extended setup fee.

UNI-ROYAL 470 ohm 1% — Basic. Series resistor on rotary encoder switch line (between U1 pin 11 / D10 and E1 switch). NOT a Q1 base resistor — Q1 base ties directly to U1 pin 1 (D0) in this design (upstream Anavi quirk; consider adding a base resistor in a future revision).
S8050 (C2146) is the most common Basic SOT-23 NPN. BC817-25 (C181583) also Basic but Extended fee may apply — verify.
Kailh PG1511 — Basic on JLCPCB. Or buy from a keyboard supplier (cheaper per unit).
EC11 with switch 20mm shaft — Basic. Or generic equivalent from AliExpress.
Standard 2.54mm male header — Basic. Cut from a 40-pin strip.

Comment: Seeeduino XIAO RP2040 (or any XIAO variant)
Notes: XIAO RP2040 — buy from Seeed or JLCPCB. NOT included in PCBA. User plugs in.
Standard 2.54mm female header — cut from longer strip. Solder these so user can plug XIAO.
